mapper.sql: id, register_id, prescription_id, patient_id, patient_name, guide_content, source, status, error_message, create_time, update_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO medication_guide (register_id, prescription_id, patient_id, patient_name, guide_content, source, status, error_message, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{registerId}, #{prescriptionId}, #{patientId}, #{patientName}, CAST(#{guideContent} AS JSONB), #{source}, #{status}, #{errorMessage}, COALESCE(#{createTime}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP), COALESCE(#{createTime}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP))
mapper.select: SELECT FROM medication_guide WHERE register_id = #{registerId} ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM medication_guide WHERE register_id = #{registerId} ORDER BY id DESC
